name: IPL Scorecard Reasoning
description: Evaluate whether an agent can answer deterministic cricket scorecard questions from real Indian Premier League data.

binding_vow.description: Each episode presents a compact scorecard derived from public Cricsheet Indian Premier League ball-by-ball data. The agent must answer one factual or arithmetic question, such as the winner, victory margin, chase target, powerplay comparison, death-overs runs, or remaining chase runs after 10 overs. Good agents read the structured scorecard carefully, perform the small calculation when needed, and return only the requested value.

observation_space.description: { "source": object, "instructions": string, "question": string, "match": { "match_id": string, "date": string, "season": string, "event": string, "match_number": number|null, "city": string|null, "venue": string|null, "teams": string[], "toss": object, "result": object, "scorecard": [{ "team": string, "total_runs": number, "wickets_lost": number, "overs_batted": string, "over_runs": number[], "powerplay_runs": number, "death_overs_runs": number, "top_batters": object[], "best_bowling_figures": object[] }] } }

action_space.description: Concise answer text, or JSON with an "answer" field

reward.description: 1.0 if the normalized answer exactly matches the expected scorecard-derived value, 0.0 otherwise
